name: Category: OWASP Top Ten 2004 Category A9 - Denial of Service
description: This is a category grouping weaknesses related to the A9 category in the OWASP Top Ten 2004, covering denial of service vulnerabilities including uncontrolled resource consumption, missing release of resources, NULL pointer dereference, and uncontrolled recursion. Categories are informal organizational groupings and are prohibited for vulnerability mapping since 2019.
